ab: kalih, yako mangowip ila maraS ka kaka:at, So’o kayzaeh ay paSibae:aeh ’iyakin?
ch: W:kalih，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: kalih, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?
I don’t have one either. This is ’away’s.

ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.
Sure, take it.
Thank you and thank ’away for me.
May I help you?

ab: yako ’am minobih ka hini roSa’ kina:at.
en: I want to return these two books.
No problem and what else do you need?

ab: yako ’am Somibae:aeh hini to:o’ ka kina:at.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: ’a:ay. to:o’ hahila: sizaeh pinobih, ’izi’ ngowip o.
ch: A:好了。三天後要拿來還，不要忘記喔。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.
You haven’t returned me the eraser.
I returned it yesterday.

ch: M:我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了？
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: niSo’ Si: paSibae:aeh ila hi kalih ay
en: Did you lend it to kalih?

ab: kiraeh. ya:o ta somingozaw hi siya.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.
I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: ’away, hini katoeh ni kalih pinaSibae:aeh ’iniSo’ ay?
en: ’away, did kalih lend you this coat?

ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: ni kalih ka katoeh hingha’ ki ’inSo’o a.
en: kalih ’s coat is the same as yours.

ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我的不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: ’away, So’o hayza’ ay Somibae:aeh ka rayhil kala kalih?
en: ’away, did you borrow money from kalih?

ab: hayza’, ya:o koSa’ kaysa’an ’am minobih hi siya, yako mangowip ila maraS ka rayhil.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.
Then, when will you return the money?

ab: ma’an rim’aen ka pinobih hi siya.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.
Okay, I will tell kalih for you.
